description_long: This sculpture features a stylized human face emerging from a jagged, crystalline base, giving the impression of a figure partially encased in or formed from stone or mineral. The facial features are angular and abstract, with pronounced cheekbones, a defined nose, and deep-set eyes, all rendered in a faceted, geometric style. The top of the head is irregular and fragmented, blending seamlessly into the surrounding crystalline structures that rise vertically from the base. The back of the sculpture is hollowed out, revealing a rough, open cavity, while the sides display elongated, shard-like protrusions that enhance the sense of organic growth. The entire surface is textured with sharp ridges and facets, suggesting a material like stone or cast metal. The color is a uniform dark gray, further emphasizing the raw, mineral-like quality of the piece.
description: A dark gray, angular sculpture of a human face emerging from jagged, crystalline forms, with a hollowed back and rough, faceted texture.
description_view_0: The front view shows the stylized human face clearly, with sharp, geometric features and crystalline shards rising around the base.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the elongated, shard-like protrusions and the irregular, fragmented top, with the face partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a large, hollow cavity at the back of the head, with the crystalline structure encasing the base.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the jagged, angular surface and the transition from the crystalline base to the fragmented head.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract human face with crystalline forms
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
